details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: (1) stepper.tsx marked with 'use client' and exports all 7 required components plus useStepper hook; (2) every sub-component has proper data-slot attributes (stepper, stepper-item, stepper-trigger, stepper-title, stepper-description, stepper-separator, stepper-content) and uses cn() for class merging throughout; (3) React context properly implemented with StepperContext and StepperItemContext with corresponding useContext hooks for state sharing; (4) orientation support fully implemented with both horizontal and vertical orientations, data-orientation attributes, and conditional styling; (5) demo file includes 'use client', properly uses Stepper/StepperItem/StepperTrigger/StepperContent, demonstrates useState for active step management with navigation buttons; (6) registry entries correctly added to both _registry.ts files with proper types and dependencies; (7) only new files created, no existing files modified. Implementation is production-quality with comprehensive context usage, proper accessibility attributes, and clean component composition.
